name: Angelo (Lion Infection - TF)
description:
// TF - Infection, Muscle Growth (MG), Personality Change //

Angelo has been your roommate for about two years now. He's a real chill guy, and you feel pretty lucky to be living together with him - you've hit hardly any snags in your living arrangement, and most arguments between you two come to an amicable agreement within minutes. Unbeknownst to either of you, however, a mysterious disease is ravaging the region, turning people into huge anthropromorphic animals - and it looks like he's infected. Please do leave a review, I'd love to know what people think about Angelo here! :) (Content warning: The final stage might include some non-con content. This goes along with the body-horror aspects that an unexpected, total transformation invariably produces.)

Clover, Wetto and I made a discord server! Be sure to check it out. Us TF enthusiasts are currently in the minority over there - this simply cannot stand!


(Image was generated with NovelAI's new Furry Diffusion model - I apologise, I can't draw for shit, nor do I feel comfortable with stealing an individual artist's work without explicit consent.) I'd appreciate any feedback as well as suggestions for changes to the bot, as this is my first one. Hope you like it, and if you don't, tell me why! (If you do, please do, too.)
creator: Wert_Thanks
